summary: Iteration 4 FULL PASS for HackerWare bilingual EN/ES + manual-NEXT + Fake News Detective rebuild + timer pause. All 14 review items verified end-to-end with the public preview URL (?v=6). Zero console errors and zero page errors across EN and ES playthroughs.
verified_features: Start screen renders lang-en-button (active) + lang-es-button + CHOOSE LANGUAGE / ELIGE IDIOMA label.

Clicking ESPAÑOL: subtitle -> 'MICRO-JUEGOS DE CIBER-SEGURIDAD', play -> 'JUGAR', startHint -> Spanish; Game.lang flips to 'es'; active class moves to lang-es-button (CSS .lang-btn.active). applyLanguage() applies synchronously.
Clicking ENGLISH switches everything back; Game.lang = 'en'.

All data-i18n elements update: subtitle, play, startHint, time->TIEMPO, cyberTip->CIBER-CONSEJO, next->SIGUIENTE, gameOver->FIN DEL JUEGO, gameOverSub->TU MISIÓN CIBER HA TERMINADO, playAgain->JUGAR DE NUEVO, chooseLang.

All 5 mini-games render Spanish prompts/instructions/labels when Game.lang='es': Password ('ARRASTRA LAS PIEZAS A LAS CASILLAS'), MemeShield ('HAZ CLIC SOLO EN LOS MENSAJES CRUELES...'), FakeNews ('¡ALERTA DE CHAT!', 'BASURA', 'VERIFICADO'), Inbox ('BANDEJA(SEGURO)', 'BASURA(VIRUS)', 'CLASIFICADOS 0 / 5', ES fake email body), Phishing ('¡HAZ CLIC EN LA LÍNEA CIAN BRILLANTE PARA CORTARLA!', 'RECLAMA TU PREMIO AQUÍ - ¡100% GRATIS!').
Fake News random pool: across 10 forced mounts -> 4 fake-news-alert and 6 true-news-alert (>=1 each). Both data-testids present and styled correctly.

Fake News all 4 routes: fake -> recycle-bin = YOU WIN; fake -> verified-folder = OH NO; true -> verified-folder = YOU WIN; true -> recycle-bin = OH NO. All verified via drag simulation with HTML5 pointer events.
Feedback overlay NEVER auto-advances: held visible for 6+ seconds with feedback screen still display!='none'.
Timer is paused on feedback screen: Game.timerInterval === null at every feedback-state read (verified in all 4 Fake News routes + 6s wait test).
NEXT/SIGUIENTE button label is bilingual via data-i18n=next; clicking it hides #screen-feedback and advances to #screen-intro for the next round.
ES feedback screen: result text shows '¡GANASTE!' / '¡OH NO!', tip label 'CIBER-CONSEJO', button 'SIGUIENTE'.
ES Game Over screen: title 'FIN DEL JUEGO', subtitle 'TU MISIÓN CIBER HA TERMINADO', survived summary '¡Sobreviviste 2 rondas!', button 'JUGAR DE NUEVO'.
Natural ES playthrough (lang switch then PLAY): HUD shows TIEMPO + RONDA 1, mini-game intro+content fully Spanish.
ZERO console errors and ZERO page errors during all EN and ES tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor (non-blocking): line 1700 in startNewGame() hardcodes `document.getElementById('round-label').textContent = 'ROUND 1';` instead of using `t('round')`. Not user-visible because line 1713 inside nextRound() immediately overwrites with the localized value before HUD renders. Suggest using t('round') + ' 1' for consistency.

Minor i18n consideration (non-blocking): the round-label element does NOT carry a data-i18n attribute (its label+number are set imperatively). If a future feature lets users change language mid-game, applyLanguage() will not refresh the label until nextRound() runs again. Today the toggle is start-screen only so this is fine.

Polish (non-blocking): per iteration 3 note, several MiniGame tipWin/tipLose pairs are identical (e.g., Meme Shield). Educational value would improve with differentiated win vs lose copy in both EN and ES.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://syntax-checker-59.preview.emergentagent.com/hackerware.html?v=6 (use ?v=N cache-buster on retest). Dev hooks on window: Game, MiniGames (5 entries), Screens, Timer, I18N, t, applyLanguage, renderLives, startNewGame, nextRound, gameOver. To force a specific mini-game: `Game.lang='es'; Game.lives=3; Game.miniGameQueue=[MiniGames[N]]; renderLives(); Screens.hud(true); nextRound();` then wait ~2700ms for intro->mount. MiniGames index: 0=Password, 1=MemeShield, 2=FakeNews, 3=Inbox, 4=Phishing. Fake News random: call the above repeatedly with N=2 to draw new items from pool. To win FakeNews drag [data-testid=fake-news-alert] -> [data-testid=recycle-bin] OR [data-testid=true-news-alert] -> [data-testid=verified-folder] (use pointer down+move+up, 12 steps). Feedback selectors: [data-testid=feedback-result] (YOU WIN!/OH NO!/¡GANASTE!/¡OH NO!), #fb-tip, [data-testid=next-button], [data-i18n=cyberTip]. Game over hook: window.gameOver(); selectors [data-i18n=gameOver], [data-i18n=gameOverSub], [data-testid=gameover-summary], [data-i18n=playAgain]. Timer pause check: Game.timerInterval === null on feedback screen.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs reproduced. All bilingual + manual NEXT + Fake News redesign + timer-pause features behave exactly as specified.
